description: Replace hardcoded WORKSPACE_CRATES with runtime manifest parsing for Rust and Python project detection

userStories.title: Extract Rust crate names from Cargo.toml in manifest.rs
userStories.description: As a scanner, I need to parse Cargo.toml to auto-detect workspace crate names so that import resolution knows which names belong to the project.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse [package] name from Cargo.toml and normalize hyphens to underscores
Parse [workspace.members] directories and extract crate names from last path component
Return combined list in ManifestAnalysis struct
Handle parse error with tracing::warn! and return empty list
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract Python package names from pyproject.toml in manifest.rs
userStories.description: As a scanner, I need to parse pyproject.toml to auto-detect project package names so Python absolute imports can be resolved correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse [project] name from pyproject.toml (PEP 621) and normalize hyphens to underscores
Parse [tool.poetry] name as fallback when PEP 621 is absent
PEP 621 takes precedence when both are present
Handle parse error with tracing::warn! and return empty list
Combine with Rust crate names into single internal_names list
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist internal names to repo_metadata in orchestrator
userStories.description: As a scanner, I need to store auto-detected internal names in repo_metadata so the graph layer can read them at query time.
acceptanceCriteria: After manifest parsing, compute internal_names = auto-detected union config.local_packages
Write internal_names as JSON array to repo_metadata under key workspace_crates
Empty list gracefully stored when no manifests found
Incremental rescan updates workspace_crates when manifest changes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add load_internal_names() and remove hardcoded WORKSPACE_CRATES
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to read internal names from the database at query time and remove the hardcoded constant that only worked for Seshat itself.
acceptanceCriteria: Add load_internal_names(conn, branch_id) that reads repo_metadata.workspace_crates JSON and deserializes to Vec<String>
Return empty Vec when key is missing or JSON is invalid
Remove const WORKSPACE_CRATES from dependencies.rs
Delete is_workspace_crate() function
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update function signatures in dependencies.rs for dynamic internal names
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all import resolution functions to accept a dynamic internal names list so they work correctly for any project, not just Seshat.
acceptanceCriteria: Rename resolve_workspace_crate_import to resolve_internal_crate_import and add internal_names parameter
Update is_likely_internal signature to accept internal_names: &[String]
Update resolve_import, build_dependencies, module_to_path_suffix signatures
Update query_dependencies to call load_internal_names once and pass result down the chain
Python absolute imports matching first segment of internal_names are resolved via suffix index after stripping prefix
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add manifest parsing tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests verifying manifest parsing correctly extracts and normalizes crate/package names from Cargo.toml and pyproject.toml.
acceptanceCriteria: Test single Cargo.toml crate: [package] name = my-app → ['my_app']
Test workspace: members = ['crates/core', 'crates/api'] → ['core', 'api']
Test workspace + root package → combined list
Test hyphen normalization: my-crate → my_crate
Test empty members: [] → []
Test invalid TOML → [] + no crash
Test PEP 621: [project] name = my-package → ['my_package']
Test Poetry fallback: [tool.poetry] name = my-package → ['my_package']
Test PEP 621 takes precedence over Poetry
Test local_packages union with auto-detected names
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add graph resolution tests with dynamic internal names
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests verifying import resolution correctly uses dynamic internal names for Rust and Python imports.
acceptanceCriteria: Test use seshat_graph::foo with ['seshat_graph'] in DB → resolved to file path
Test use serde::Serialize with any internal names → unresolved (external)
Test empty internal names → all :: imports = external
Test from my_package.utils import foo with ['my_package'] → resolved to my_package/utils.py
Test from django.db import models with ['my_package'] → external
Test query_dependencies end-to-end with workspace crate → DependencyEntry.resolved = true
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Final verification — compile, lint, and format
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the full test suite, linter, and formatter to pass before merging.
acceptanceCriteria: cargo test --all-targets — all tests pass (existing + new)
cargo clippy -- -D warnings — no warnings
cargo fmt --check — formatting consistent
const WORKSPACE_CRATES is completely removed from dependencies.rs
